user_system_path: Live diagnostic (2026-07-01) found real R1-shaped commitment candidates being silently killed pre-LLM by evaluateCommandCenterCandidateGate's INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN bare-UUID clause, which was false-positiving on raw commitment/signal ids that hunt-anomalies.ts embedded directly into evidenceLines. This is plausibly the actual reason #567's first indispensable card hasn't fired despite the scorer selecting real winners. Fix: drop the raw ids from evidenceLines (two finding kinds); the regex itself is untouched so real request_id/provider_error/stack-trace leaks are still caught. Also thread the already-computed suppressionTrace into pipeline_runs.raw_extras (currently discarded) so future suppressed runs are diagnosable from history instead of a second live query against a single-slot overwritten field.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS: No Stripe, Scout (lib/scout — the outward R6 rung re-enters only behind owner sign-off + new anti-fabrication guardrails), schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate — every gate change carries a test + before/after read. R1's own-activity carve-out is additive (does not weaken the external-entity requirement for any other class).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck && npm run lint; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence
required_browser_proof: Live (owner/Supabase MCP): trigger the next real pipeline run (or wait for one) and re-query pipeline_runs.raw_extras + auth.users.raw_user_meta_data.workday_presence_suppression_trace for 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f — confirm the two stuck commitment candidates (due 2026-07-05, 2026-07-07) now produce a real card or get blocked by a genuinely different, legitimate reason.
browser_proof_command: Supabase MCP: select raw_user_meta_data->'workday_presence_suppression_trace' from auth.users where id = '2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f'; and select outcome, gate_funnel, raw_extras from pipeline_runs order by created_at desc limit 5;
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + typecheck/lint/vitest green + PR merged + live re-query confirms the false positive is gone.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations
INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN itself unchanged — still catches request_id/provider_error/stack-trace/req_... leaks (regression test in artifact-quality-gate.test.ts)
no loosening of any existing quality gate; no auto-send
stop_condition: #606 PR merged; live re-query of pipeline_runs/workday_presence_suppression_trace confirms the two stuck commitment candidates are no longer false-positived as internal_debug_token.
next_command: After #606 lands and is live-verified: #567 owner sign-offs (tkg_goals re-ground + Gmail connector 1→967); #597 live dismissal-tap verification once a real card exists.
